title: Student Portal
subtitle: Use the same email you registered with. We'll send you a link to sign in.
serviceUnavailable: Portal temporarily unavailable — try again shortly.

saved.title: Saved scholarships
saved.empty: You have not saved any programs yet. Tap the heart on a scholarship card to save it.

journey.title: Application journey
journey.loadError: Could not load your journey. Try refreshing the page.

register.title: Registration received
register.description: We have your details and assigned you a case officer.

eligibility.description: Your qualifications and German level are being verified.

documents.title: Document collection
documents.description: Upload transcripts, certificates, and passport copy.

anerkennung.title: Credential recognition (Anerkennung)
anerkennung.description: We guide your diploma review and recognition with German authorities—no language course enrollment.

placement.description: Matching with German hospital and Ausbildung contract.

visa.description: Embassy appointment, visa issuance, and flight to Germany.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Photo and contact details.
profile.avatarInvalidType: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.

settings.title: Profile & preferences
settings.loadError: Could not load your profile. Sign out and sign in again with the same email as your registration.
settings.cvRevampBody: Tell us what to focus on (target role, language, gaps). Our team will reach out.
settings.cvRevampPlaceholder: e.g. BSc Nursing, targeting Ausbildung programs in Bavaria…
settings.cvRevampLocked: Premium includes a professional CV / resume revamp.

otp.registeredEmailHint: Use the same email address you used when you registered your interest. Codes are only sent to registered emails.
otp.codeSentConfirm: We sent a sign-in email. Open it on your phone to continue.
otp.checkEmailSubtitle: We sent a sign-in link to
otp.magicLinkStep2: Tap Sign in in the email
otp.magicLinkStep3: You will be signed in automatically
otp.openEmailHint: Open your email on this phone, then come back here if you prefer to enter the code.
otp.magicLinkAlreadyUsed: This sign-in link was already used. Request a new code to sign in.
otp.magicLinkExpired: This sign-in link has expired. Request a new sign-in email.
otp.magicLinkInvalid: This sign-in link is invalid or has expired.

errors.invalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Try again or request a new code.
errors.notRegistered: No account found for this email. Register your interest first, then sign in with the same address.
errors.rateLimited: Too many code requests. Please wait an hour and try again.
errors.sessionNotSaved: Code accepted, but your session could not be saved. Allow cookies for this site and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
